media.tools_section.brand_lift.title: Brand lift
media.tools_section.brand_lift.content:
Ad hoc research on the effectiveness of promo integration by key brand metrics:

  • Brand knowledge level
  • Advertising awareness level
  • Consideration and brand preference
  • Intention to make a purchase
media.tools_section.campaign_radar.title: Campaign radar
media.tools_section.campaign_radar.conte:
Online research of all promo integrations via influencers on YouTube:

  • Analysis of activity by advertiser categories
  • Competitor analysis - strategy, coverage, budgets
  • TOP YouTube channels in terms of brand relevance
  • Crossing channels by audience, interests
  • Channel lists with similar audience
